# Happimess — Full Content Index

> Happimess is a US-based direct-to-consumer e-commerce brand (Shopify) selling stylish home organization, storage furniture, and trash management products. The brand's guiding belief: "a clutter-free home leads to a happier life." Products ship via FedEx to the 48 contiguous US states. The site is available in English (primary) and Spanish (/es/).

---

## Brand Overview

**Mission:** Happimess believes that a well-organized, clutter-free space contributes to a stress-free and tranquil environment. Every product bearing their label has undergone rigorous testing to ensure it is designed to withstand the demands of everyday use.

**Contact:**
- Email: hello@happimess.com
- Phone: (917) 261-4961
- Hours: Monday–Friday 9AM–5PM EST; live chat daily 9AM–5PM
- Address: EST (US East Coast timezone; exact street address not publicly listed)

**Social:**
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/happimessofficial/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/happimess_official/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@happimess_official
- Pinterest: https://www.pinterest.com/happimessofficial/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6lUDdoZeZrYnoY2kmZyf4g

---

## Trash Cans

- [All Trash Cans](https://happimess.com/collections/trash-can): Master collection for all Happimess trash cans. Includes step-open, sensor/touchless, dual-compartment recycling, push-button, and slim models. Capacities range from 6 gallons (compact bathroom) to 17+ gallons (large kitchen). Available in stainless steel, matte black, white, chrome, and beige finishes. Sub-categories: kitchen, bathroom/bedroom, office, outdoor/garage, recycling-friendly.

- [Step-Open Trash Cans](https://happimess.com/collections/step-trash-cans): Foot-pedal step-open trash cans; key models include Molly (8 gal, round, stainless steel/black), Nathan (8 gal, round, stainless steel), Oscar (8 gal, round), and Slyd (10.6 gal). Many include a free bundled mini trash can. Stainless steel and fingerprint-resistant finishes available.

- [Sensor / Touchless Trash Cans](https://happimess.com/collections/sensor-trash-cans): Motion-sensor hands-free trash cans. Flagship line: Robo Kitchen 13.2-gallon slim oval sensor trash can in chrome, black, white, and beige. Ideal for kitchen and bathroom use where hands-free operation is preferred.

- [Dual-Compartment / Recycling Trash Cans](https://happimess.com/collections/dual-compartment-trash-cans): Side-by-side double-bucket trash and recycling cans. Key models: Elmo 30L/8 gal double-bucket with soft-close lid; Beni 60L/16 gal kitchen trash/recycling can; Ashley 8 gal with soft-close lid. Designed for households with recycling separation needs.

- [Push-Button Trash Cans](https://happimess.com/collections/push-button-trash-cans): Trash cans with push-button lid-open mechanisms for hands-limited or high-traffic use.

- [Indoor and Outdoor Trash Cans](https://happimess.com/collections/indoor-outdoor-trash-cans): Trash cans rated for both indoor kitchen use and outdoor/garage/patio placement. Weathering resistance and larger capacity focus.

- [Waste Bins](https://happimess.com/collections/waste-bins): Smaller-capacity bins (under 5 gallons) for bathroom, bedroom, and office desk use.

- [Best-Selling Trash Cans](https://happimess.com/collections/best-selling-trash): Curated top-seller list for trash cans based on sales performance. Useful starting point for shoppers.

- [Trash Bundles](https://happimess.com/collections/trash-bundle): Pre-configured sets pairing a trash can with matching trash bag liners at bundled pricing.

---

## Storage Furniture

- [Storage Furniture](https://happimess.com/collections/storage-furniture): Master collection for furniture with integrated storage. Includes storage benches, trunks, ottomans, coffee tables with storage baskets, accent tables, and rolling filing baskets. Materials: handwoven water hyacinth, wicker, rattan, acacia wood, and manufactured wood. Styles: farmhouse, coastal, bohemian, modern.

- [Storage Benches](https://happimess.com/collections/storage-bench): Lift-top and drawer-configuration storage benches in wicker and hyacinth weave. Sizes: 30"–47". Key models: Rustic 30" 2-drawer wicker bench (gray), Rustic 43.3" 3-drawer wicker bench, Palermo 34.5" 2-drawer wicker bench. Suitable for entryway, bedroom, and living room.

- [Wicker Trunks](https://happimess.com/collections/wicker-trunk): Standalone wicker and rattan storage trunks. Key models: Michael 35" wicker storage trunk, Elijah 30" wicker storage trunk, Naples 47.5" wicker trunk storage bench, Anada (wicker weave 30" storage trunk), Caden 30" and 46" wicker storage trunks. Used as blanket chests, toy boxes, and decorative storage.

- [Outdoor Storage Furniture](https://happimess.com/collections/outdoor-storage-furniture): Storage furniture designed for outdoor use — decks, patios, and garden areas. Includes wooden outdoor storage boxes and weather-resistant seating with storage.

- [Storage Stools](https://happimess.com/collections/storage-stools): Upholstered and woven storage ottomans that double as seating and storage; hourglass and round styles available.

- [Storage Tables](https://happimess.com/collections/storage-tables): Coffee tables and accent tables with integrated storage baskets or compartments.

- [Under-the-Bed Storage](https://happimess.com/collections/under-the-bed-storage): Rolling storage bins with lids designed to fit under standard bed frames. Hyacinth weave and 360-degree lockable wheel models available. Key model: Ashton 18.11" rolling filing basket with lid.

- [Storage Bundles](https://happimess.com/collections/storage-bundles): Pre-packaged furniture storage bundle sets combining complementary pieces.

- [Best-Selling Storage Furniture](https://happimess.com/collections/best-selling-storage-furniture): Top-selling storage furniture items curated by sales performance.

---

## Organization

- [Organization](https://happimess.com/collections/organization): Master collection for home organization products including baskets, bins, shelves, racks, and carts. Styles include coastal rattan, rustic farmhouse hyacinth, and industrial metal.

- [Bins and Baskets](https://happimess.com/collections/bins-baskets): Handwoven rattan and water hyacinth nesting storage baskets. Sold in sets of 2–3. Styles: coastal (Yael), bohemian cottage (Vista), rustic (Arbour, Reed), minimalist (Leif, Tress). Many include handles; some include wheels.

- [Shelves](https://happimess.com/collections/shelves): Wall-mounted shelving options including metal wall shelves, walnut floating shelves, bar shelves, and shelves with wood brackets. Industrial bookcase model: Tulare 72.05" wall-mounted bookcase.

- [Carts](https://happimess.com/collections/carts): Rolling storage carts on wheels for kitchen, bathroom, and office. Movable and multi-tier configurations.

- [Trays](https://happimess.com/collections/trays): Decorative and functional trays including wooden serving trays, bamboo trays, and wood-fired pottery trays.

- [Planter Baskets](https://happimess.com/collections/planter-baskets): Woven baskets designed for use as plant pot holders and indoor planters. Also listed as Baskets for Planting and Hanging Flower Baskets sub-collections.

- [3D Planter](https://happimess.com/collections/3d-planter): Specialty planter products with three-dimensional or sculptural designs.

- [Floor Baskets](https://happimess.com/collections/floor-basket): Large floor-standing woven baskets for living rooms and bedrooms; decorative and functional storage.

- [Cubes / Stackable Storage Cubes](https://happimess.com/collections/stackable-storage-cubes): Modular stackable cube storage units.

- [Organization Bundles](https://happimess.com/collections/organization-bundles): Pre-configured organization product sets at package pricing.

- [Best-Selling Organization](https://happimess.com/collections/best-selling-organization): Top-performing organization products by sales.

---

## Kitchen and Bathroom

- [Kitchen and Bathroom](https://happimess.com/collections/kitchen): Combined collection covering kitchen and bathroom accessories including dish racks, bathroom bins, soap dispensers, and organizational accessories.

- [Dish Racks](https://happimess.com/collections/dish-racks): Compact and adjustable dish drying racks. Models include Brooklyn 24" adjustable dish rack and compact dish rack with drain tray and wine glass holder.

- [Bamboo Kitchen Accessories](https://happimess.com/collections/bamboo-kitchen-accessories): Bamboo-material kitchen organization accessories; sustainable material focus.

- [Black Bathroom Accessories](https://happimess.com/collections/black-bathroom-accessories): Coordinated black-finish bathroom accessories set.

- [Toilet Paper Holders](https://happimess.com/collections/toilet-paper-holders): Freestanding and wall-mounted toilet paper holder options.

- [Hampers](https://happimess.com/collections/hampers): Laundry hampers and linen storage baskets.

- [Shower Shelf](https://happimess.com/collections/shower-shelf): Corner or wall-mounted shower shelving for bathroom organization.

- [Motion Sensor Bathroom Trash Can](https://happimess.com/collections/motion-sensor-bathroom-trash-can): Small-capacity hands-free touchless trash cans specifically sized for bathroom countertop or floor use.

- [Stainless Steel Bathroom Trash Can](https://happimess.com/collections/stainless-steel-bathroom-trash-can): Stainless steel finish bathroom waste bins; fingerprint-resistant options.

---

## Coat Racks and Shoe Racks

- [Coat Racks](https://happimess.com/collections/coat-racks): Freestanding 5-hook metal parlor-style coat racks. Key models: Ethan 5-hook 72.8" metal parlor coat rack (black/chrome), Aiden 70.4" 5-hook metal coat rack (black/white).

- [Shoe Racks](https://happimess.com/collections/shoe-racks): Iron shoe racks in 2-tier and 3-tier configurations. Key models: Industrial Compact 10.75" 6-pair 2-tier shoe rack, Modern 24" 9-pair 3-tier curved iron shoe rack, Minimalist 24.5" 9-pair 3-tier thin flat plate shoe rack. Also available: wall-to-wall shoe rack configurations.

---

## Consumables and Subscriptions

- [Trash Bags and Liners](https://happimess.com/collections/trash-bag): Custom-fit drawstring trash bag liners in 5.3 gallon (20L), 8.0 gallon (30L), and 13.2 gallon (50L) sizes. Scented variants: lemon and lavender. Unscented clear liners also available. Compostable green bags and heavy-duty black contractor liners in the range. Sold in 3-packs of 20 liners (60 total).

- [Cleaning Wipes](https://happimess.com/collections/wipes): Multi-surface cleaning wipes. Sold as standalone products and available via subscription.

- [Subscribe and Save Collection](https://happimess.com/collections/subscribe-save): Subscription storefront for all subscribable consumables. 20% off for monthly delivery frequency; 10% off for quarterly delivery. Customers can skip, reschedule, or cancel anytime. Subscription prices: $22.99–$32.99 per pack versus one-time prices of $29.00–$45.99.

- [Refill Page](https://happimess.com/pages/refill-page): Dedicated landing page for the Subscribe and Save refill program. Highlights scented drawstring liners (lemon, lavender) and unscented options. Subscription pricing shown with savings versus retail. Spring promotional code SPRING25 (25% off orders over $100, one-time purchases only, subscriptions excluded).

- [Build a Box](https://happimess.com/pages/build-a-box): Interactive bundle customization tool allowing customers to combine trash cans, liners, wipes, and accessories into a personalized Happimess box with bundled pricing.

---

## Key Pages

- [About Us](https://happimess.com/pages/about-us): Brand story and values page. States the core philosophy: "we believe that a clutter-free home leads to a happier life" and "a well-organized space contributes to a stress-free and tranquil environment." Describes quality commitment: "every product bearing our label has undergone rigorous testing." Products described as "designed to withstand the demands of everyday use." Emphasizes functional aesthetics.

- [FAQs](https://happimess.com/pages/faqs): Answers to top customer questions. Key facts: orders ship within 1–2 business days (Mon–Fri); tracking numbers activate within 2–3 business days; 30-day return policy with $10 fee per item and prepaid label; returns require original packaging; freight/white glove returns are customer-paid; ships only to 48 contiguous US states; orders cannot be modified or cancelled once placed.

- [Return Policy](https://happimess.com/pages/return-policy): 30-day return window from date of receipt. Prepaid FedEx return label provided for contiguous US customers. $10 return fee per item deducted from refund. All items must be returned in original packaging. Freight items (large furniture) and white glove delivery items require customer-arranged and customer-paid return shipping. Final sale and made-to-order items are non-returnable.

- [Shipping Policy](https://happimess.com/pages/shipping-policy): Ships via FedEx. Standard delivery: 3–5 business days transit. Order fulfillment: 1–2 business days Monday–Friday. Shipping to 48 contiguous US states only; no international shipping, no Hawaii, no Alaska at this time.

- [Financing](https://happimess.com/pages/financing): Details on installment payment and buy-now-pay-later financing options available at checkout. Terms subject to credit approval.

- [Ambassador Program](https://happimess.com/pages/ambassador-program): Happimess brand ambassador program for influencers, content creators, and brand advocates. Specific benefits and application process available via the page.

- [Contact Us](https://happimess.com/pages/contact-us): Primary customer support page. Email: hello@happimess.com. Phone: (917) 261-4961. Live chat available. Support hours: Monday–Friday 9AM–5PM EST; chat daily 9AM–5PM.

- [Accessibility Statement](https://happimess.com/pages/accessibility-statement): WCAG accessibility compliance details and commitment to digital accessibility for users with disabilities.

- [Privacy Policy](https://happimess.com/pages/privacy-policy): Data collection, use, storage, and sharing practices under applicable US privacy laws.

- [Terms and Conditions](https://happimess.com/pages/terms-conditions): Website usage terms and purchase terms governing transactions on happimess.com.

---

## Blog Content — The Mess Experts

All articles are published under the byline "From The Mess Experts." Publication dates are not displayed on individual articles. Articles are 550–3,500 words. Topics span trash can selection guides, home organization, storage furniture, eco-friendly living, and home decor trends.

- [Blog Index](https://happimess.com/blogs/news): Landing page listing all published blog articles. 24+ articles as of early 2026.

- [Standard Kitchen Trash Can Size: The Complete Guide](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/standard-kitchen-trash-can-size): Most data-rich trash can sizing guide. Key measurements: small kitchens 4–6 gallons (12–16" height); average kitchens 7–13 gallons (20–25"); large family kitchens 14–20 gallons (25–30"). Recommends 10–13 gallons as optimal for most households. Family of four with 10-gallon bin should empty every 2–3 days. Covers dimensions, selection factors, lid types, materials, waste sorting, eco-friendly options, and maintenance.

- [The Guide to Choosing the Perfect Kitchen Trash Can](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/the-guide-to-choosing-the-perfect-kitchen-trash-can): Buyer's guide covering size and capacity (large vs. slim), materials (stainless steel vs. plastic), lid mechanisms (step-on pedal, sensor, push), advanced features (dual-bucket, dog-proof, odor control), and aesthetic considerations. Attributed to Happimess product expertise.

- [Average Kitchen Trash Can Size](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/average-kitchen-trash-can-size): Reference sizing guide complementing the standard size article; covers typical capacity ranges by household size and kitchen type.

- [Organization Do's and Don'ts for 2025: Practical Tips for a Clutter-Free Home](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/organization-do-s-and-don-ts-for-2025-practical-tips-for-a-clutter-free-home): Covers choosing practical vs. trendy storage, avoiding open shelving for tidier spaces, integrating storage with home design, prioritizing simplicity and long-term functionality over short-lived organizational trends.

- [Tips for Organizing Your Kitchen: A Comprehensive Guide](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/tips-for-organizing-your-kitchen-a-comprehensive-guide): Decluttering steps, categorizing and grouping items by function, maximizing vertical and hidden storage, creating dedicated functional workstations, maintaining organization through consistent routines.

- [Transform Your Living Room with the Perfect Storage Bench: The Ultimate 2025 Buying Guide](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/living-room-storage-bench): Covers bench types (lift-top, drawer, open-shelf, upholstered, wicker/rattan, industrial), size selection, material comparisons (wood, fabric, leather, wicker, metal), styling, lifestyle considerations, maintenance, and 2025 design trends. Weight capacity range: 200–400 lbs for typical models.

- [3 Kitchen Trends for 2025](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/kitchen-trends-for-2025): Cool metals and stainless accents, wooden fixtures and natural materials, storybook/whimsical aesthetic, sustainable materials, and smart kitchen technology integration.

- [Kitchen Trends for 2025](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/kitchen-trends-for-2025): Covers design and material trends shaping kitchen spaces in 2025 including metallic finishes, organic wood elements, and eco-conscious choices.

- [Trash Can Maintenance Tips and Tricks for a Fresh and Odor-Free Bin](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/trashcan-maintenance-tips-and-tricks-for-a-fresh-and-odor-free-bin): Cleaning frequency recommendations, odor control methods, liner selection for odor management, and long-term bin maintenance practices.

- [Trash Can Decor: Creative Ways to Incorporate Your Bin into Your Home Design](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/trash-can-decor-creative-ways-to-incorporate-your-bin-into-your-home-design): Design-forward approach to trash cans as home decor elements; color coordination, finish matching, and style integration tips.

- [Stash and Hide: 9 Ways to Hide Your Trash Can](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/stash-and-hide-9-ways-to-hide-your-trash-can): Nine specific methods for concealing kitchen and living room trash cans — cabinet integration, decorative covers, furniture enclosures, and spatial positioning.

- [How Trash Recycling Can Create a Better Environment for Your House](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/how-trash-recycling-can-create-a-better-environment-for-your-house): Home recycling system setup, how dual-compartment bins facilitate separation, environmental impact of household recycling.

- [The Benefits of Recycling: How You Can Help the Environment and Save Money](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/the-benefits-of-recycling-how-you-can-help-the-environment-and-save-money): Environmental benefits of household recycling, potential cost savings, and practical steps for starting a home recycling program.

- [Effortless Composting: How a Trash Can with an Attachable Compost Bin Can Make a Difference](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/effortless-composting-how-a-trash-can-with-an-attachable-compost-bin-can-make-a-difference): Introduction to home composting, how compost-capable trash cans work, and the environmental impact of composting kitchen waste.

- [10 Eco-Friendly Kitchen Swaps to Make Today](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/10-eco-friendly-kitchen-swaps-to-make-today): Ten practical substitutions for reducing kitchen waste, including reusable liners, compostable bags, bamboo accessories, and low-waste storage.

- [Handy Trash Bag Hacks You Might Not Know](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/handy-trash-bag-hacks-you-might-not-know): Practical tips for maximizing trash bag performance, preventing liner slippage, and extending bag life.

- [10 Ways to Style a Clothing Rack for a Chic and Organized Bedroom](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/10-ways-to-style-a-clothing-rack-for-a-chic-and-organized-bedroom): Ten styling and organizational approaches for open clothing racks in bedrooms; color-coding, accessory display, and capsule wardrobe integration.

- [Storage Benches Are More Relevant Than You Think](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/storage-benches-are-more-relevant-than-you-think): Use cases for storage benches in entryways (shoe/bag storage), bedrooms (blanket/accessory storage), and living rooms (multi-function seating and storage).

- [What Makes Michael Wicker Trunk Storage So Special](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/what-makes-michael-wicker-trunk-storage-so-special): In-depth article on the Michael 35" wicker storage trunk — design features, material quality, use cases, and what differentiates it from other storage trunks.

- [Benefits of Happimess Double Bucket Macro Trash Solution](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/benefits-of-happimess-double-bucket-macro-trash-solution): Product spotlight on the Happimess dual-compartment trash and recycling can system.

- [From Garment Racks to Wicker Trunks: What Are the Key Benefits](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/from-garment-racks-to-wicker-trunks-what-are-the-key-benefits): Overview of the Happimess product ecosystem spanning clothing storage and wicker trunk solutions.

- [Most Creative Trash Cans and Best Practices in 2020](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/most-creative-trash-cans-and-best-practices-in-2020): Historical roundup of creative and design-forward trash can concepts and best maintenance practices.

- [Gold Trash Cans: The New Trend](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/gold-trash-cans-the-new-trend): Overview of gold, brass, and metallic-finish trash cans as an emerging interior design trend.

- [Economy Home Decor 2025](https://happimess.com/blogs/news/economy-home-decor-2025): Budget-friendly home decor and organization product ideas for 2025.

---

## Spanish Storefront

The full Happimess catalog and all key pages are available in Spanish at the /es/ subdirectory. Spanish URLs mirror English URLs exactly with the /es/ prefix.

- [Spanish Homepage](https://happimess.com/es/): Full site in Spanish.
- [Spanish Trash Cans](https://happimess.com/es/collections/trash-can)
- [Spanish Storage Furniture](https://happimess.com/es/collections/storage-furniture)
- [Spanish Organization](https://happimess.com/es/collections/organization)
- [Spanish Blog](https://happimess.com/es/blogs/news)
- [Spanish About Us](https://happimess.com/es/pages/about-us)
- [Spanish FAQs](https://happimess.com/es/pages/faqs)

---

## Key Business Facts

- Brand: Happimess
- URL: https://happimess.com
- Platform: Shopify (server-side rendered; all content in initial HTML)
- Business model: Direct-to-consumer e-commerce
- Product categories: Trash cans, storage furniture, home organization, cleaning consumables
- Languages served: English (primary), Spanish (/es/)
- Shipping carrier: FedEx
- Shipping coverage: 48 contiguous US states only (no Hawaii, Alaska, or international)
- Fulfillment time: 1–2 business days
- Delivery time: 3–5 business days transit
- Return policy: 30 days; $10 fee; prepaid label for contiguous US; original packaging required
- Subscribe and Save discount: 20% monthly, 10% quarterly
- Financing: Available at checkout, subject to credit approval
- Support email: hello@happimess.com
- Support phone: (917) 261-4961
- Support hours: Mon–Fri 9AM–5PM EST; chat daily 9AM–5PM
- Blog: 24+ articles at /blogs/news/ by "The Mess Experts"
- Brand mission: "A clutter-free home leads to a happier life"
